overall.description: First-person gameplay footage moving through a surreal, distorted European city street with wavy building textures, approaching the Basilique Notre-Dame cathedral. The scene transitions from a narrow alley with abandoned vehicles to a tree-lined path alongside the gothic cathedral, ending with a view of modern buildings ahead.

tall historic stone building with greenish wavy texture and arched openings
distorted wavy asphalt surface with unusual geometric patterns

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through a surreal narrow alley between two tall, distorted stone buildings with wavy textures. The asphalt ground has an unusual geometric pattern, and the alley extends straight ahead toward a distant opening.

scene_state.functional_zone: alley with abandoned vehicle approaching cathedral district

events.description: blue sedan parked on the left side of the narrow street comes into view
slight left turn to navigate around the parked vehicle

agents.ego_description: navigating around the parked blue car while continuing forward toward the distant cathedral

entered.detail: abandoned blue sedan parked against the left building wall
tall gothic stone tower with pointed spires visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and navigates around a parked blue sedan in the narrow alley. As the vehicle is passed on the left, a gothic cathedral tower becomes visible in the distance, and the left building facade recedes behind the camera.

moving from narrow alley to open area at the base of the cathedral

tall stone wall with mossy texture on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the camera approaches the Basilique Notre-Dame, with leafy trees appearing on the left and a stone wall on the right. The text overlay identifies the landmark as the camera moves closer to the massive gothic facade and tower.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage alongside cathedral exiting to modern district

events.description: modern office buildings become visible ahead as the cathedral recedes to the left

agents.ego_description: continuing through the narrow passage past the cathedral toward the modern buildings visible ahead

entered.detail: tall modern concrete and glass office building visible through the passage ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the cathedral, which recedes to the left, through a narrow stone passage. Modern office buildings become visible in the distance ahead, contrasting with the historic architecture, as the path continues forward between stone walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a surreal, distorted urban alleyway that gradually opens up to reveal a grand gothic cathedral before leading toward a modern cityscape. It begins by navigating a narrow passage between tall stone buildings with wavy textures and a geometrically patterned asphalt ground. As the camera moves forward and passes a parked blue sedan on the left, the restrictive walls recede to reveal the distant tower of the Basilique Notre-Dame. The scene then expands into a tree-lined path alongside the massive gothic facade and stone walls, moving closer to the landmark before gliding past it. Finally, the cathedral recedes to the left as the camera enters a narrow stone passage that opens toward a cluster of modern office buildings in the distance.
